png("species_accumulation_curve.png",
    width = 2500, height = 1400, res = 300)

curva <- specaccum(matriz_sol, method = "random")

plot(curva,
     xlab = "Host trees",
     ylab = "Cumulative species richness",
     main = "Species accumulation curve",
     col = "blue", lwd = 2,
     ci.type = "polygon",
     ci.col = "lightblue")

dev.off()
